title: Implement Meshtastic stream framing and adapter dispatcher
description: Why this exists: protobuf messages must be framed, decoded, dispatched, and answered consistently before individual app flows can work. What needs to be done: implement the Meshtastic app-stream framing layer, input reassembly, output queueing, protobuf dispatch table, request correlation where needed, and explicit unknown/unsupported handling. Acceptance criteria: native_sim tests cover valid frame, split frame, malformed length, oversized frame, unknown message, and disconnect cleanup; dispatcher routes MVP messages to stub handlers; output backpressure is bounded; no raw RF Meshtastic packets enter LICHEN radio path.
notes:
2026-07-01 final: implemented and pushed Meshtastic adapter/dispatcher MVP. Added core adapter stream/raw dispatcher, gateway BLE drain thread, session-scoped BLE enqueue/reset guards, and ztests. Behavior: heartbeat queues bounded queueStatus, want_config_id emits config_complete_id echo, disconnect marks session/disconnects without RF, TEXT_MESSAGE_APP is staged at the app boundary with no raw RF emission, unsupported packet/unknown raw paths return deterministic queueStatus, malformed/oversized raw and framed inputs are rejected with stream resync.

Reviews/subagents: explorer agents covered Meshtastic contract/vectors, gateway/BLE hooks, and ztest design. Final code reviews: Meitner found P2 same-buffer stream resync issue; fixed and re-reviewed clean. Mendel and Hypatia found no blocking findings. Prior P2 gateway-thread end-to-end coverage debt filed as project-LICHEN-t2hn.5.1. Twister runner/tooling gap filed as project-LICHEN-t2hn.5.2. Prepared-write concern checked against Zephyr GATT docs; prepare callbacks validate only, with ATT long-write evidence already tracked by t2hn.21. Rich config sync remains t2hn.6; real LICHEN text ingress remains t2hn.7.

Verification: local qemu_x86 adapter test PASS 14/14. EC2 clean checkout commit 320f460f direct native_sim runs: meshtastic_adapter PASS 14/14, meshtastic_codec PASS 11/11, meshtastic_ble PASS 7/7. EC2 R1 Neo gateway build with -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=meshtastic_compat.conf produced zephyr.elf; config evidence: CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_CODEC=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_ADAPTER=y, # CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_BLE is not set, CONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1, CONFIG_BT_ATT_PREPARE_COUNT=4, CONFIG_BT_L2CAP_TX_MTU=247, CONFIG_BT_DEVICE_NAME="LICHEN". Size: text=244528 data=6022 bss=75862 dec=326412. Twister attempted on EC2 but failed under native_sim runner/BT-device tooling after direct tests had passed; tracked in project-LICHEN-t2hn.5.2.
close_reason: Completed Meshtastic adapter dispatcher MVP with direct native_sim coverage and R1 Neo Meshtastic gateway build evidence; follow-up Twister/gateway-thread coverage gaps filed.
